Feats — Male Human Rogue: 8
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 19 (+4) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 20 (+5)
Background: Criminal Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 4; Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 2; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 40185/48000 Level: 8 Size: Medium Speed: 40 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Actor: +1 Charisma
Athlete: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Fate: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)

Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Ability Boost (Strength)
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)

Chef: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Wisdom)
Crossbow Expert: +1 Dexterity
Crusher: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Defensive Duelist: +1 Dexterity
Dual Wielder: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Durable: +1 Constitution

Elemental Adept (Lightning): Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Fey-Touched (Charisma): +1 Charisma
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Great Weapon Master: +1 Strength
Heavily Armored: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Heavy Armor Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Inspiring Leader (Charisma): +1 Charisma
Keen Mind (Expertise): +1 Intelligence
Lightly Armored: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Mage Slayer: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Martial Weapon Training: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Medium Armor Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Stregth, Dexterity)
Moderately Armored: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Mounted Combatant: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity, Wisdom)
Observant (Expertise): Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom)
Piercer: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Poisoner (Dexterity): +1 Dexterity
Polearm Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Resilient (Dexterity): +1 Dexterity
Ritual Caster: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Sentinel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Shadow-Touched (Charisma): +1 Charisma
Skill Expert: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Slasher: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Speedy: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Constitution)/+10 Speed
Telekinetic: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Charisma, Intelligence, Wisdom)
Telepathic: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Charisma, Intelligence, Wisdom)
Weapon Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Ability Boosts: 41 to distribute
Athlete: Standing, running long jump, and running high jump each use only 5' of movement/Can climb at full speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Actor; Alert; Archery; Athlete; Blind Fighting; Boon Of Combat Prowess; Boon Of Dimensional Travel; Boon Of Energy Resistance; Boon Of Fate; Boon Of Fortitude; Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity); Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength); Boon Of Recovery; Boon Of Skill; Boon Of Speed; Boon Of Spell Recall; Boon Of The Night Spirit; Boon Of Truesight; Charger; Chef; Crafter; Crossbow Expert; Crusher; Defense; Defensive Duelist; Dual Wielder; Dueling; Durable; Elemental Adept (Acid); Elemental Adept (Cold); Elemental Adept (Fire); Elemental Adept (Lightning); Elemental Adept (Thunder); Fey-Touched (Charisma); Grappler; Great Weapon Fighting; Great Weapon Master; Healer; Heavily Armored; Heavy Armor Master; Inspiring Leader (Charisma); Interception; Keen Mind (Expertise); Lightly Armored; Lucky; Mage Slayer; Poisoner (Dexterity); Polearm Master; Protection; Resilient (Dexterity); Ritual Caster; Savage Attacker; Sentinel; Shadow-Touched (Charisma); Sharpshooter; Shield Master; Skill Expert; Skilled; Skulker; Slasher; Speedy; Spell Sniper; Tavern Brawler; Telekinetic; Telepathic; Thrown Weapon Fighting; Tough; Two-Weapon Fighting; Unarmed Fighting; War Caster; Weapon Master Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Rogue Features: Arcane Trickster; Armor Training (Light); Cunning Action; Cunning Strike; Evasion; Expertise; Mage Hand Legerdemain; Reliable Talent; Rogue Subclass; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Sneak Attack; Spellcasting; Steady Aim; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons) Criminal Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence); Alert; Skill Proficiency (Sleight Of Hand; Stealth); Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools)
Feature Notes:
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Blind Fighting: TODO
Boon Of Energy Resistance: TODO
Boon Of Fortitude: TODO
Boon Of Recovery: TODO
Boon Of Skill: TODO
Boon Of Speed: TODO
Dueling: TODO
Interception: TODO
Protection: TODO
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Thrown Weapon Fighting: TODO
Unarmed Fighting: TODO
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +7 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +5
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +5 Persuasion: (cha) +5
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +10
Deception: (cha) +5 Nature: (int) +8 Stealth: (dex) +7
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +7 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Arcana; Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Animal Handling; Nature; Perception; Sleight Of Hand
Tool Proficiency: Cook's Utensils: (wis); Poisoner's Kit: (int); Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Celestial; Common; Dwarvish; Halfling; Thieves' Cant
Skill Notes:
Chef: Tool Proficiency (Cook's Utensils)
Crafter: Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from Carpenter's Tools, Leatherworker's Tools, Mason's Tools, Potter's Tools, Smith's Tools, Tinker's Tools, Weaver's Tools, Woodcarver's Tools)
Expertise: Has expertise in 4 chosen proficient skills
Musician: Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any Musical Instrument)
Poisoner (Dexterity): Tool Proficiency (Poisoner's Kit)
Skill Expert: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Thieves' Cant; Choose 1 from any)
Actor: Has advantage on Deception and Performance to impersonate another person and can mimic others' speech or sounds (successful DC 16 Insight detects)
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Crafter: Can buy nonmagical items at a 20% discount/Can use a crafter tool to build an item at the end of a long rest that lasts until the next long rest
Healer: Can expend a use of a Heler's Kit to allow a target to expend a Hit Die, regaining the roll +3 hit points; a 1 on the roll can be rerolled
Keen Mind (Expertise): Can use a bonus action to Study
Keen Mind (Expertise): Skill Expertise (Choose 1 from Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, Religion)
Musician: Can give Heroic Inspiration to 3 allies at the end of a rest
Observant (Expertise): Can use a bonus action to Search
Observant (Expertise): Skill Expertise (Choose 1 from Insight, Investigation, Perception)
Poisoner (Dexterity): 1 hr process using a Poisoner's Kit creates 3 poison doses
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool check rolls
Skill Expert: +3 on a chosen proficient skill
Skulker: Can hide when lightly obscured/Ranged miss does not reveal position/Suffers no disadvantage on Perception from dim light
Telepathic: R60' Can speak telepathically in a shared language
Combat
Hit Points: 52 Initiative: +7 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Improvised Weapons; Light Weapons; Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Padded Shield: Shield Weapons: Dagger (+7 1d4+4 P R20/60; Nick); Light Crossbow (+7 1d8+4 P R80/320; Slow); Light Hammer (+6 1d4+3 B R20/60; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+6 1d4+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +3 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +8
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Heavily Armored: Armor Training (Heavy)
Lightly Armored: Armor Training (Light)
Martial Weapon Training: Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Medium Armor Master: +1 Armor Class in medium armor if Dexterity is at least 16
Moderately Armored: Armor Training (Medium)
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Tavern Brawler: Weapon Proficiency (Improvised Weapons)/Unarmed Strike inflicts 1d4 HP
Tough: +16 Hit Points
Weapon Master: Weapon Proficiency (Choose 4 from any Simple Weapon, any Martial Weapon)
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Can treat an attack miss as a hit once per turn
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Can teleport 30' after attacking or casting
Boon Of Fate: R60' Can modify a d20 roll by 2d4 once per initiative or rest
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +19 damage
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +17 damage
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Can use a bonus action to become invisible in dim or no light; taking an action, bonus action, or reaction ends
Charger: Gains +10 Speed during a Dash/After moving 10' to attack a foe, can inflict an additional 1d8 HP or 10' push once per turn
Crossbow Expert: Ignores the loading quality of proficient crossbows/Suffers no disadvantage on crossbow attacks within 5'/Can add the ability modifier to the damage from an extra attack with a Light crossbow
Crusher: Can move a foe up to 1 size larger 5' with a bludgeoning hit once per turn, and a critical bludgeoning hit gives advantage on attacks on that foe until the start of the next turn
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict a choice of: poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates; Huge and larger targets are unaffected) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 20' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Defensive Duelist: Can use a reaction when hit while wielding a finesse weapon to gain +3 Armor Class until the start of the next turn
Dual Wielder: Can draw or stow two weapons simultaneously/After attacking with a Light weapon, can use a bonus action to attack with a non-two-handed weapon; only a negative ability modifier is added to the damage from this bonus attack
Durable: Can use a bonus action to regain hit points from a Hit Die roll
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Great Weapon Master: Can use a bonus action to attack after scoring a critical hit or reducing a foe to 0 hit points with a melee weapon/Can inflict +3 HP with Heavy weapons during an Attack action
Heavy Armor Master: Suffers -3 HP from bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing attacks when wearing heavy armor
Inspiring Leader (Charisma): R30' 10-min speech at the end of a rest gives 6 allies 13 temporary hit points
Lucky: Can gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save or inflict foe disadvantage an attack on self 3 times per long rest
Mage Slayer: Attacks inflict disadvantage on concentration to maintain a spell
Mounted Combatant: Has advantage on attacks on adjacent unmounted foes smaller than mount and can redirect attacks on mount to self
Piercer: Can reroll 1 piercing damage die once per turn and adds 1 die to piercing critical damage
Poisoner (Dexterity): Attacks negate poison resistance/Can use a bonus action to coat a weapon with poison lasting 1 min that inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned (save DC 15 Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Polearm Master: Can use a bonus action after attacking with a polearm to attack with the opposite end, inflicting 1d4 HP bludgeoning/Can use a reaction to attack a foe who enters polearm reach
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sentinel: Successful opportunity attacks halt the target/Can make an opportunity attack when a foe uses Disengage and when an adjacent foe attacks another
Sharpshooter: Suffers no disadvantage on attacks at long range/Ranged attacks ignore 3/4 cover/Can make a -5 attack with a ranged weapon to inflict +10 damage
Shield Master: Can use a bonus action to shove the target 5' after an attack
Slasher: Can inflict -10 Speed for 1 rd with a slashing attack, and a critical slashing hit inflicts disadvantage on the foe's attacks for 1 rd
Sneak Attack: Once per turn, inflicts +40d6 HP on an attack using a finesse or ranged weapon with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature
Speedy: Taking a Dash allows moving normally over difficult terrain for the remainder of the turn/Opportunity Attacks on self have disadvantage
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action and forego moving to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Tavern Brawler: Can reroll 1s on Unarmed Strike damage, and a successful Unarmed Strike can also push the target 5' once per turn
Telekinetic: R30' Can use a bonus action to move a target 5' (save DC 11 + ability modifier Strength negates)
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage taken from a seen attacker by half
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Intelligence
Save: Charisma: +5; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +7; Intelligence: +5; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes:
Resilient (Dexterity): Save Proficiency (Dexterity)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: In dim or no light, has resistance to all damage other than psychic and radiant
Durable: Has advantage on death saves
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Mage Slayer: Can turn a failed Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma save into a success once per short rest
Mounted Combatant: Mount's successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failed saves yield half damage
Shield Master: +2 Dexterity vs. targeted spells and effects, and can use a reaction to suffer no damage instead of half on a successful Dexterity save
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; D0: 2; D: 1; W0: 4; W: 7 Spell Slots: W1: 4; W2: 2 Attack: C: +4; D: +4; Rogue: +5; W: +5 Spell DC: C: 12; D: 12; Rogue: 13; W: 13
Spells:
Invisibility (Shadow Touched Charisma2 [Shadow-Touched (Charisma)] Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Mage Hand (Rogue0 [Mage Hand Legerdemain] Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Misty Step (Fey Touched Charisma2 [Fey-Touched (Charisma)] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Magic Notes:
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Chef: Food prepared during a short rest adds 1d8 to hit points regained from using Hit Dice by 7 diners, and a 1-hr process produces 3 treats that each give 3 temporary hit points when consumed within 8 hr
Elemental Adept (Acid): Spells that inflict acid damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Cold): Spells that inflict cold damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Fire): Spells that inflict fire damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Lightning): Spells that inflict lightning damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Fey-Touched (Charisma): Can cast Misty Step and a chosen level 1 divination or enchantment spell once per long rest
Healer: Can reroll 1s when using a spell to restore hit points
Mage Hand Legerdemain: Can use a bonus action with an invisible Mage Hand to make Sleight Of Hand checks
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Ritual Caster: Always has prepared 3 chosen spells with the [R] tag/Can cast a spell as a ritual in its normal casting time once per long rest
Shadow-Touched (Charisma): Can cast Invisibility and a chosen level 1 illusion or necromancy spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Spell Sniper: Can cast attack spells at double normal range/Spells ignore 3/4 cover/Knows an additional attack cantrip
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the Wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Telekinetic: Knows the Mage Hand cantrip
Telepathic: Can cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 11 + ability modifier Wisdom negates) once per long rest
War Caster: Has advantage on concentration saves to maintain a spell/Can cast when holding a shield or a weapon/Can use a reaction to cast as an opportunity attack in response to movement
Notes
Validation Errors:
Ability Boost Allocation: 41 available vs. 12 allocated
Archery Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Blind Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Boon Of Combat Prowess Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Dimensional Travel Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Energy Resistance Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Fate Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Fortitude Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity) Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength) Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Recovery Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Skill Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Speed Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Spell Recall Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19 and spellcasting feature (currently 1)
Boon Of The Night Spirit Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Truesight Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Defense Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Dueling Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Feat Allocation: 3 available vs. 82 allocated
Great Weapon Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Interception Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Protection Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Shield Master Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 4 and shield armor proficiency
Skill And Tool Proficiency Allocation: 15 available vs. 8 allocated
Thrown Weapon Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Tool Proficiency Allocation: 6 available vs. 0 allocated
Two-Weapon Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Unarmed Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Weapon Proficiency Allocation: 4 available vs. 0 allocated
